preview: 4.3 Background Verification 4.3.1 BGV shall be initiated on DoJ and completed within 15 calendar days. 4.3.2 Adverse findings not resolved within 30 days may result in suspension of employment under Termination and Suspe

6. Non-Compliance and Corrective Actions  6.1 Failure to complete statutory registration, BGV, or security clearance within prescribed timelines shall result in withholding of confirmation. 6.2 Misrepresentation of crede

6.2  Reimbursement Claims  6.2.1 Reimbursement claims shall be submitted within 30 days of discharge with complete documentation. 6.2.2 The TPA shall settle admissible claims within 15 working days. Delays beyond 30 days
